Structured object › Required field
------------------------------------
- kind: object_required_field
- family: structuredObject
- targets: collection
- scope: item
- severity: error
- purpose: Require that a frontmatter field exists.

Family context
--------------
Structured-object check types validate structured frontmatter fields using schema-backed checks.

Configuration keys (1)
----------------------
- field
  required: yes
  default: -
  meaning: Frontmatter key that must be present.

Example
-------
  collections:
    notes:
      path: notes
      checks:
        - kind: object_required_field
          field: year

Other structured object (7)
---------------------------
- object_field_enum
- object_field_type
- object_number_range
- object_sentence_case
- object_string_length
- filesystem_unique_field
- object
